titleStmt.title: SII 25.188: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 188. (A.R. No. 188 of 1908.) KŌVILŪR, PATTUKKOTTAI TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Mantrapurīśvara temple.

This record may be assigned on palaeographical grounds to c. 13th Century. It records the grant of maḍakku lands excluding the tirunāmattuiṟuppu of the deity such as kaḍamai, kuḍimai, niṉaippuṭṭ-taṇḍum, etc., enjoyed as tirunāmattukkāṇi by Paṭṭāṇḍār, wife of Tillaivāṉuṟaivāṉ, the kāṇiyāḷar of Rājēndrapuram, by Rājarāja-Chēdirāyar for the worship and services (tiruppaṇi) to the goddess Buvaṉādipati-nāchchiyār which came to be installed and worshipped in the western side tirunaḍaimāḷigai in the temple of Tiruvuśāttāṉam-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār at Uśāttāṉam alias Kēraḷakulāśaṉichchaturvēdimaṅgalam. An order (ōlai) recording the iṟaiyili grant of lands is stated to have been issued by the nagarattār of Mummuḍiśōḻapuram in [Puṟaṅ]karambai-nāḍu in Rājēndraśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu. This was ordered to be engraved on the wall of this temple and attested by several officers. Among the signatories mention may be made of Vikkiramaśōḻamūvēndavēḷāṉ and others.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrācentira coḻatevaṟkku yāṇṭu nālāvatu Irācen=tirar coḻavaḷanāṭṭup puṟaṅkarampai nāṭṭu mummuṭicoḻapurattu nakarattom Olai . Ucāttāṉamāṉa keraḷa kulācaṉiccarup peri maṅkalattu Uṭaiyār tiruvucāttāṉamuṭaiyanāyaṉār koyil tāṉattār kaṇṭu Ināyaṉār tirutakunaṇakku yyāṟu Uṭaiyār Irāca Irāca cetirāyar Iṉṉāyaṉār koyilil melaittirunaṭaimāḷikaiyil Eḻuntaruḷavittu pū
cai koṇṭu Aruḷukiṟa puvaṉātipati nācciyāṟkku pūcaikkum tiruppaṇikkum Uṭalāka Eṅkaḷ kāṇiyāḷar Irācentiracoḻapurattu tillaivāṉuṟaivāṉ caṉāy Ivaṉ Apāvattu Ivaṉ pāriyaip paṭṭāṇṭār tirunāmattukkāṇi(kkā) Ā(k)ka nirvā(tu)ttu muṉṟāvatu kār mutal Aṉupavittu potukiṟa nilamāy nāṅkaḷ1. This portion is left unengraved. Ūrkiḻ Iṟaiyili cetu kuṭutta nilattukku kiḻpākkellai Ittillaivāṉuṟaivāṉa parāmaṉ nilattukku meṟkkuteṉ pāṟkka Ellai
cāttaṉuṭaiyāṉ periyanāyaṉ nilattukku vaṭakku merpāṟkku Ellai muṉṉuṟṟuvaṉp peruvaḻikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkku Ellai Aṅkayar per Erikku teṟ(ku)kum Āka Icaiñca Iṉṉāṅkellaikkuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa nilamāy Uṭaiyār tirupuvaṉa viratevaṟkku muppattu Eṭṭāvatu Aḷaviṉpaṭi nālāntara nilam Orumā Iṉnilam Orumāviṉāl maṭakkunilam kiḻ Oṉpatu māvum nālāvatu nāḷ patiṉmuṉṟu mutal Ūṟkiḻ Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭuttamaiyil Innilattukku Innāḷmutal kaṭamai
kuṭimai Uḷḷaṉavum niṉaippuṭṭu taṇṭum vaṟkkaṅkaḷum Ūr viṉipokaṅkaḷ Uḷppaṭa Iṉṉāyaṉār tirunāmattu Iṟuppukaḻittu Eṅkaḷ Ūrile Eṟṟi Iṟukka kaṭavomākavum Inilam nāṅkaḷ Ūṟkiḻ Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭuttapaṭiye cantirātittavaṟc cellak kaṭavatākavum Ippaṭiyai Iṉṉāyaṉār koyilile kalveṭṭik koḷḷak kaṭavatākac coṉṉom Ippaṭi ceyyap paṇṇuvate paṇiyāl Ūr kaṇakku cākkāṉamuṭaiyāṉ Ainūṟṟuva veḷ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai teṉkarai nāṭṭu muttaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai vaiykaināṭṭu koṉṉeḻuttu § Ippaṭikku Ivai vikkiramacoḻa muventa (venta) veḷāṉ ṉeḻuttu § Ippaṭikku Ivai ceḻiyataraiyaṉṉeḻuttu § Ippaṭikku Ivai Irācarāca teṉ(ṅ)karai nāṭṭu mutta veḷāṉ ṉeḻuttu § Ippaṭikku mukariveḷāṉṉeḻuttu § Ippaṭikku Ivai Iṭarkiḷai nāṭṭu koṉṉeḻuttu § Ippaṭikku Ivai teṉṉavatarayaṉ ṉeḻuttu § Ippaṭikku Ivai cempiyaṉ pallavarayaṉ ṉeḻuttu § Ippaṭikku vaḷavatarayaṉ ṉeḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 25.188 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
